name: classic15-mdcli22-advanced-policy
description: Validation-only advanced compare policy for Nokia Classic CLI 15 to Nokia MD-CLI 22 fixture checks.

bgp.message: Secret/hash rendering differs between Classic and MD-CLI fixtures.
Neighbor descriptions are intentionally shortened in the MD-CLI target fixture.

static-route.message: Metric 100 is a known target fixture default.
Route descriptions are not fully represented in the partial MD-CLI fixture.

interface.message: MD-CLI fixture expands implicit ICMP defaults.

port.message: Target fixture default MTU is not a semantic migration key.
Target scheduler policy requires QoS migration review, not line-level abnormal scoring.

lag.message: MD-CLI generated LACP key differs from Classic LAG ID.

fixturePolicy.notes: The target fixture is feature-split. This policy reduces known field-level noise only; it does not mark missing source objects as converted.
